_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communicate the results of AI risk assessments to relevant stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences, translating statistical risk measures into business impact terms.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-003 (AG, cosine: 0.746), AG-S-005 (AG, cosine: 0.711).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.697). Shared vocabulary: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only terms [assessments, communicate, relevant, results, stakeholders] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, business, communicating, findings, impact, measures] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.908 (P=0.930, R=0.887). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Communicate the results of AI risk assessments to relevant stakeholders." and "Skill in communicating AI risk findings to technical and non-technical audiences" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.776 > STS 0.697 (gap +0.080). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only: [assessments, communicate, relevant, results, stakeholders]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, business, communicating, findings, impact, measures].
